name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-57
title: Inv 17 mandates dispatch-tdd-subagent.py emit brand prefix + ANSI directly, but contract Inv 36 forbids that producer
description:
Constitution conflict introduced by BUG-55 fix.

Contract feature Inv 36 (.claude/features/contract/docs/spec/spec.md) names exactly four authorized [rabbit]-emitting producer scripts (sync-check.py, session-init.py, refresh.py, tdd-state-machine/tdd-step.py) and forbids direct inline ANSI escapes, brand-prefix strings, and bar strings outside rabbit_block.

But tdd-subagent Inv 17 mandates dispatch-tdd-subagent.py (NOT on that authorized list) emit '\x1b[33m[(rabbit-emoji) rabbit (rabbit-emoji)] NOTE: ...' directly in the assembled prompt preamble. The script at lines 218-223 does exactly that.

Two resolution paths:
(a) Route dispatch-tdd-subagent.py through rabbit_print.py: add a 'dispatch-bypass-note' message-id to the registry, add a bypass_note() named wrapper, and update dispatch-tdd-subagent.py to call the wrapper instead of inline ANSI/brand strings.
(b) Amend contract Inv 36 to add dispatch-tdd-subagent.py as a 5th authorized producer.

Path (a) is preferred — it keeps contract Inv 36 small (only 4 authorized producers) and routes all brand-emitting code through one renderer. Path (a) requires coordinated changes in contract (registry + wrapper + spec Inv 34/35 update) and tdd-subagent (use wrapper, update Inv 17 wording). Will be worked together with the contract cycle landing first.
